OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:

Plaintiff MANJULA PATEL, is present IN PRO PER.
Defendant EDGAR MULLEN, is present.
Attorney AARON A. FARMER, representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem MARK SCHREIBER, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of MAY 9, 2011 is vacated.
